features: 【Personalized Wedding Guest Book】: Use this personalised wedding guest book alternative as an alternative to a traditional guest book at your wedding, offering an elegant, thoughtful and unique way to welcome your friends and family. If you love personalization, this beautiful personalised guest book wedding will be perfect for you.

【Perfect Set】: You will receive a value-for-money wooden heart guest book wedding replacement package that includes 1 clear acrylic guestbook, 1 wooden stand, 1 wooden storage box, 100 wooden hearts, 1 small writable chalkboard and 1 chalkboard stand. This is a unique wedding decoration that can create a perfect party.

【Excellent Quality And Durability】: Our love heart wedding guest book is made of durable wood and highly transparent acrylic panels that clearly display the wooden hearts inside and preserve those memories for a long time without damaging them. The wood hearts are laser cut with a flat surface and smooth edges, heart shape guest book is perfect for guests to sign.

【Memories To Cherish Forever】: The heart guest book sign with 100 signed hearts can be placed vertically on an assembled wooden stand and placed on the reception table. After the event, you can cherish your special day forever by displaying wedding signs for reception or hanging the rustic wedding guest book on the wall.

【Versatile】: The wedding guest book alternative heart is perfect for wedding cards, graduation party decorations, birthday decorations, birthday party supplies, funerals and more. This rustic guest book is suitable for themed decorations for any occasion and is also a great gift for friends who are hosting a party soon.
